metadata.title: Stealthy Side Peek Turns Into a Clean 2v1 Double Kill in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch how a careful side peek and sharp aim catch two enemies off guard. Timing and positioning really made this play stand out. Where’s your favorite spot to pull off sneaky plays?

Got a slick clutch like this? Share your best moments below!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps #valorantclips
